task: 10-round bug hunt on Day 3 integration harness per Mr.Long 'chạy bug sâu 10 vòng'

real_bugs_found_and_fixed.before: pool.on('connect', client => client.query('SET search_path...').catch(...))  — fire-and-forget, races subsequent queries
real_bugs_found_and_fixed.after: options: '-c search_path="<schema>",public' in Pool config — Postgres startup parameter, server-side, zero race window
real_bugs_found_and_fixed.impact: every test could intermittently fail with table-not-found errors

real_bugs_found_and_fixed.before: Migration loop bare — if migration throws, scoped pool + schema leak (cleanup never returned to caller)
real_bugs_found_and_fixed.after: try/catch wraps migration loop; on failure pool.end() + rescuePool DROP SCHEMA CASCADE + rethrow

rounds_clean.R8_other_fire_and_forget: 2 remaining only on pool.end() shutdown — appropriate
rounds_clean.R9_cumulative_day1_2_rescan: all Day 1+2 fixes still in place

informational_findings: Scanner R8 false-positive: 'DRIFT' detected on canonicalStringify because w2 no longer has the function (it imports from anti_dupe) — scanner heuristic needs patching but source is correct
Scanner R7 false-positive: 'reason' reported as unused EXPIRE_MAP key — it's actually a RollbackResult field
